# Resource (hush_grok_access_privilege)

Manage Grok access privileges in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a Grok access privilege with specific endpoints and models
resource "hush_grok_access_privilege" "example" {
  name        = "chat-only"
  description = "Access to Chat endpoint with grok-2 model"
  endpoints   = ["Chat"]
  models      = ["grok-2"]
}

# Create a full access privilege (all endpoints and models)
resource "hush_grok_access_privilege" "full" {
  name        = "full-access"
  description = "Full access to all Grok endpoints and models"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Grok access privilege

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Grok access privilege
- `endpoints` (List of String) The list of allowed Grok API endpoints. If omitted or empty, all endpoints are allowed. Valid values: `Chat`, `Batch`, `Embed`, `Files`, `Image`, `Models`, `Sample`, `Video`, `Voice`, `Tokenize`, `Documents`.
- `models` (List of String) The list of allowed Grok model names. If omitted or empty, all models are allowed.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Grok access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege
